name: Les Petersen Drilling & Pump
tagline: Three generations of North Bay water-well expertise since 1946
seoDescription: Les Petersen Drilling & Pump is a family-run Santa Rosa water-well contractor serving Sonoma, Napa, Marin & Mendocino since 1946 — well drilling, pumps

sections.heading: North Bay's water-well experts since 1946
sections.subheading: Now in its third generation under Matt Petersen, Les Petersen Drilling & Pump designs, drills, and services complete water systems for homes, ranches, and municipalities across Sonoma, Napa, Marin

items.title: Family-Owned And Operating Since 1946 — Three
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

sections.heading: About Les Petersen Drilling & Pump
body: Les Petersen Drilling & Pump has served the water needs of Northern California homeowners, farms, businesses, and municipalities since 1946, when Les Petersen founded the company. Les passed it to his son Ray, who advanced the business, and today Matt Petersen carries on the family legacy as the third generation — having spent his whole life around well drilling and pumps.

From the yard on Old Redwood Highway in Santa Rosa, the team handles the entire water system: locating and drilling the well, installing and servicing pumps and engines, wiring the electrical and controls, and treating the water for clean, reliable supply. Their focus is building life-long relationships by tailoring the solution to each property's specific geology and water situation.
highlights: Family-owned and operating since 1946 — three generations
Air-rotary rigs drill domestic, agricultural & municipal wells over 1,000 ft deep
Complete water systems: design, drilling, pumps, electrical & treatment
Serving Sonoma, Napa, Marin & Mendocino counties

items.title: Water Well Drilling
items.description: Air-rotary drilling rigs bore domestic, agricultural, and municipal wells through any local formation — capable of depths over 1,000 feet.

items.title: Pump Sales, Installation & Repair
items.description: Supply, install, and service pumps and engines for water systems and wind machines, from 20 Hp to 500 Hp in diesel, propane, and gas.

items.title: Electrical & Controls
items.description: Single- and three-phase electrical connections for water systems, including power poles, meter panels, and pump control panels.

items.title: Water Treatment Systems
items.description: Install and maintain softeners, iron and manganese filters, reverse osmosis, ozone, chlorination, and ultraviolet purification.

items.title: Well & Pump Maintenance
items.description: Ongoing service, troubleshooting, and repair to keep your well and water system running reliably year-round.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Les Petersen Drilling & Pump and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with Les Petersen Drilling & Pump
sections.body: Find us at 5434 Old Redwood Hwy. Call (707) 545-0246 — we’re glad to help.
